data.name: Lusty Rhythm: JOI Combat
data.detailed_description:
Lusty Rhythm: JOI Combat is an adult rhythm-combat experience where temptation, timing, and tactics collide.

Engage in pulse-pounding rhythm battles against seductive monster girls across a branching map full of choices and surprises. Strike in sync with the music, manage your health and mana, and unleash powerful spells to claim victory over vampires, demons, monsters and more.

Explore multiple paths through the map — each offering different encounters, rewards, and challenges. Randomized loot and upgrade options make every playthrough unique, encouraging you to experiment and replay for new experiences.

Every opponent features distinct voice acting and anime-inspired artwork, creating a gallery of personalities to discover as you conquer each level.

Features

  • 🎵 Rhythm-based combat with altered tracks across varied stages

  • 💋 Adult themes featuring seductive, anime-styled monster girls

  • ⚔️ RPG progression with spells, stat upgrades, and random rewards

  • 🗺 Branching map paths offering replayability and player choice

  • 🕹 Simple, one-handed controls — mouse or keyboard

  • 🔊 Unique character voices and immersive sound design

Keep the rhythm. Control your focus. Conquer your desires.

data.short_description: Battle seductive monster girls in rhythm-based combat across a branching map in this NSFW, anime-styled adventure.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-2100 | AMD Phenom II X4 965
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia 8800 GT 512MB | Radeon HD 6570 1GB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2550K | AMD FX-8370
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GTS 450 1GB | Radeon HD 5770 1GB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
